summary_1line: Round 1 ran successfully with status ok, but it achieved delta_ler of 0.0 and the confidence interval fields were missing. summary_1line: Round 3 ran successfully with status ok, but it matched the classical baseline exactly (ΔLER=0.0) and the CI bounds are missing. It used 477476928 FLOPs per syndrome and 207873 parameters, so the compute cost did not buy any error-rate gain. There was no previous summary to compare against, so this round does not show a step up from the prior report.
